description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine Docker image and defines a deploy stage. Add a release job that runs only on tag pipelines. In the release job execute: apk --no-cache add py3-pip python3, then pip3 install -r requirements.txt gitlab-release, then python3 ./setup.py sdist, then gitlab_release $PRIVATE_TOKEN dist/*. The job runs in the deploy stage and publishes the built distribution to GitLab releases.
